hero.description: Founder of Febraio Tecnologia. I build robust systems and digital experiences that deliver real value — with precision, performance, and purpose.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.description: A selection of systems architected, built, and shipped to production.

nexus.title: Nexus
nexus.description: Massively scalable collaboration platform supporting 50k+ concurrent users with sub-50ms latency.

orbital.title: Orbital
orbital.description: AI-powered code review assistant that detects anti-patterns, security flaws and performance bottlenecks.

vanta.title: Vanta
vanta.description: High-performance analytics dashboard for enterprise e-commerce with ML inventory forecasting and real-time data.

flare.title: Flare
flare.description: Lightweight serverless runtime for JS/WASM functions with sub-2ms cold starts for latency-critical uses.

prism.title: Prism
prism.description: Live multi-cloud topology map with auto-discovery, dependency graphs and real-time health overlays.

about.bodyOne: I'm Jonathan Febraio, Software Engineer and founder of Febraio Tecnologia. Specialized in robust web systems, high-performance APIs, and digital products that make a real difference.
about.bodyTwo: I believe the best technology solves real problems with elegance — clean code, solid architecture, and consistent delivery. From concept to deployment, every detail is part of a larger product.

quote.first: The measure of a good architecture is

founder.description: Founded and lead Febraio Tecnologia, building robust digital products for clients across multiple industries. Responsible for architecture, full-stack development, and delivering consistent technical value at scale.

senior.description: Developed high-performance APIs and scalable web systems. Led critical infrastructure migrations that reduced operational costs by 35% and improved average latency by 60%.

fullstack.description: Delivered end-to-end web solutions for enterprise clients, from conception through deployment. Directly responsible for projects with measurable impact on user conversion and retention.

freelance.description: Built systems and websites for small and medium businesses, combining product development, UI/UX, and client relationships.

testimonial.title: What They Say
testimonial.quote: Febraio Tecnologia delivered a system that has processed millions of transactions without a single incident. Jonathan is a benchmark professional in software engineering.
testimonial.name: Ana Lima

typescript.title: Why I rewrote our entire API in strict TypeScript
typescript.description: A practical deep dive into migrating a legacy JS codebase to TypeScript with strict mode — the tradeoffs, the surprises, and whether it was worth it.

consistency.title: Eventual consistency in practice: beyond CRDT theory
consistency.description: Most tutorials skip the hard parts. This one covers vector clocks, merge functions, and the bugs that only show up at 3am in production.

coldstart.title: The cold start problem is actually three problems
coldstart.description: Separating V8 isolate initialization, module graph resolution, and network warm-up as independent levers you can pull separately.

contact.description: Open to projects, partnerships, and new opportunities. If you have an interesting technical challenge or want to build something meaningful, let's talk.
